Seiten, Abschnitte und Blöcke lassen sic:
Pages, sections and blocks can be copied from another course and from your own contents.
                            For that, select "Insert page here", "Insert section here" or "Insert block here" below "This Courseware" on the left.
                            After that, first select the course from which to copy or your own contents below "Copy" on the right side.
                            Objects that can be copied can be identified by the two yellow arrows pointing to the left.

Pages, sections and blocks can be sorted.
For that, select "Sort pages", "Sort sections" or "Sort blocks" below "This Courseware" on the left.
Arrows will be shown at the objects that can be used to move the objects to the desired position.
To save the new sorting, select "Finish sorting". You can also revert the changes by selecting "Cancel sorting".

Pages, sections and blocks can be moved.
                            For that, select "Insert page here", "Insert section here" or "Insert block here" below "This Courseware" on the left.
                            After that, select the object you want to move below "Move" on the right side.
                            Objects that can be moved can be identified by the two yellow arrows pointing to the left.

Select "This Courseware" on the left.
                            This is alway selected while loading the page. The heading shows which page you
                            have currently selected. Below that are the sections of the page and in them their blocks.
                            If you want to edit a page that lies below the selected one, you can select that one via
                            the buttons in the area "Sub-pages". A navigation is shown above the heading. With it you can
                            jump up the hierarchy as far as you wish.
